description_long: This object is a long, slender sword with a straight, double-edged blade that tapers to a sharp point. The blade appears metallic with a slightly weathered, brownish patina, suggesting age or use. The hilt features a prominent, ornate guard with curved quillons and a rounded pommel, both of which are decorated with intricate patterns. The handle is cylindrical and seems to be wrapped or textured for grip, matching the color and style of the guard. The overall design is reminiscent of a historical European rapier or smallsword, suitable for thrusting and light slashing. The craftsmanship and decorative elements indicate it may be ceremonial or of high status.
description: A slender, straight-bladed sword with an ornate guard and textured handle, featuring a weathered metallic finish and decorative details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full length of the straight blade, ornate guard, and rounded pommel.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the curvature of the guard and the blade's thin profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the symmetry of the blade and the back of the guard and handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the guard's decorative curves and the blade's even taper.
attribute_handle_design: cylindrical, textured or wrapped, rounded pommel, metallic and wood elements
attribute_ornamentation: engraved patterns on guard and pommel
